en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "This shall be the law of the leprous person for the day of his cleansing. He shall be brought to the priest,
zh: “患痲風病的人得潔淨的日子，應守的律例如下：人要帶他去見祭司。

en: and the priest shall go out of the camp, and the priest shall look. Then, if the case of leprous disease is healed in the leprous person,
zh: 祭司要出到營外去察看，祭司若是看見患病的人身上的痲風病已經好了，

en: the priest shall command them to take for him who is to be cleansed two live clean birds and cedarwood and scarlet yarn and hyssop.
zh: 就要吩咐人為那求潔淨的人，拿兩隻潔淨的活鳥、香柏木、朱紅色線和牛膝草來。

en: And the priest shall command them to kill one of the birds in an earthenware vessel over fresh water.
zh: 祭司要吩咐人用瓦器盛活水，把一隻鳥宰殺在上面。

en: He shall take the live bird with the cedarwood and the scarlet yarn and the hyssop, and dip them and the live bird in the blood of the bird that was killed over the fresh water.
zh: 至於那隻活鳥，祭司要把牠與香柏木、朱紅色線和牛膝草一起拿來，把這些物品和活鳥一同蘸於那在活水上宰殺的鳥血中，

en: And he shall sprinkle it seven times on him who is to be cleansed of the leprous disease. Then he shall pronounce him clean and shall let the living bird go into the open field.
zh: 然後向那患痲風病求潔淨的人身上彈七次，就可以宣布他潔淨；又讓那隻活鳥飛到田野去。

en: And he who is to be cleansed shall wash his clothes and shave off all his hair and bathe himself in water, and he shall be clean. And after that he may come into the camp, but live outside his tent seven days.
zh: 那得潔淨的人要洗自己的衣服，剃去身上所有的毛髮，用水洗澡，就潔淨了；然後他可以進營，只是還要在自己的帳幕外住七天。

en: And on the seventh day he shall shave off all his hair from his head, his beard, and his eyebrows. He shall shave off all his hair, and then he shall wash his clothes and bathe his body in water, and he shall be clean.
zh: 第七天，他要把身上一切的毛髮都剃去；頭髮、鬍鬚、眉毛和身上一切的毛髮都剃去；又要洗衣服，用水洗身，就潔淨了。

en: "And on the eighth day he shall take two male lambs without blemish, and one ewe lamb a year old without blemish, and a grain offering of three tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil, and one log of oil.
zh: “第八天，他要取兩隻沒有殘疾的公羊羔和一隻沒有殘疾一歲的母羊羔，又要把調油的細麵三公斤作素祭，以及三分之一公升油一同取來。

en: And the priest who cleanses him shall set the man who is to be cleansed and these things before the LORD, at the entrance of the tent of meeting.
zh: 行潔淨禮的祭司領那求潔淨的人拿著這些祭物站在會幕門口，耶和華的面前。

en: And the priest shall take one of the male lambs and offer it for a guilt offering, along with the log of oil, and wave them for a wave offering before the LORD.
zh: 祭司取一隻公羊羔，獻作贖愆祭，取三分之一公升油一同獻上；祭司把這兩樣當作搖祭，在耶和華面前搖一搖。

en: And he shall kill the lamb in the place where they kill the sin offering and the burnt offering, in the place of the sanctuary. For the guilt offering, like the sin offering, belongs to the priest; it is most holy.
zh: 他要在聖潔的地方，就是宰殺贖罪祭牲和燔祭牲的地方，宰殺那隻公羊羔，因為贖愆祭牲，像贖罪祭牲一樣，是至聖的，要歸祭司；

en: The priest shall take some of the blood of the guilt offering, and the priest shall put it on the lobe of the right ear of him who is to be cleansed and on the thumb of his right hand and on the big toe of his right foot.
zh: 祭司要取些贖愆祭牲的血，抹在得潔淨的人的右耳垂上和右手的大拇指上，以及右腳的大拇趾上。

en: Then the priest shall take some of the log of oil and pour it into the palm of his own left hand
zh: 祭司又從那三分之一公升油中，取出一點來，倒在自己的左掌裡；

en: and dip his right finger in the oil that is in his left hand and sprinkle some oil with his finger seven times before the LORD.
zh: 把右手的一個指頭，蘸在左掌的油裡，在耶和華面前用指頭把油彈七次。

en: And some of the oil that remains in his hand the priest shall put on the lobe of the right ear of him who is to be cleansed and on the thumb of his right hand and on the big toe of his right foot, on top of the blood of the guilt offering.
zh: 然後祭司要把手中剩下的油，抹在那得潔淨的人的右耳垂上和右手的大拇指上，以及右腳的大拇趾上，就是抹在贖愆祭牲的血上。

en: And the rest of the oil that is in the priest's hand he shall put on the head of him who is to be cleansed. Then the priest shall make atonement for him before the LORD.
zh: 祭司要把手中剩下的油，抹在那得潔淨的人的頭上；祭司在耶和華面前為他贖罪。

en: The priest shall offer the sin offering, to make atonement for him who is to be cleansed from his uncleanness. And afterward he shall kill the burnt offering.
zh: 祭司要獻贖罪祭，為那得潔淨的人贖罪，使他脫離污穢，然後宰殺燔祭牲。

en: And the priest shall offer the burnt offering and the grain offering on the altar. Thus the priest shall make atonement for him, and he shall be clean.
zh: 祭司要把燔祭和素祭獻在祭壇上，為他贖罪，他就潔淨了。

en: "But if he is poor and cannot afford so much, then he shall take one male lamb for a guilt offering to be waved, to make atonement for him, and a tenth of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering, and a log of oil;
zh: “但如果他貧窮，經濟能力不足，他只要拿一隻公綿羊羔作贖愆祭，搖一搖為他贖罪；要把調油的細麵一公斤作素祭，和三分之一公升的油一同拿來；

en: also two turtledoves or two pigeons, whichever he can afford. The one shall be a sin offering and the other a burnt offering.
zh: 又要按他的經濟能力，拿兩隻斑鳩或是兩隻雛鴿，一隻作贖罪祭，一隻作燔祭。

en: And on the eighth day he shall bring them for his cleansing to the priest, to the entrance of the tent of meeting, before the LORD.
zh: 第八天，他為了自己得潔淨，要把這些祭物帶到會幕門口，耶和華面前，交給祭司。

en: And the priest shall take the lamb of the guilt offering and the log of oil, and the priest shall wave them for a wave offering before the LORD.
zh: 祭司要取那隻作贖愆祭的公羊羔和那三分之一公升油；祭司把這些，在耶和華面前搖一搖當作搖祭；

en: And he shall kill the lamb of the guilt offering. And the priest shall take some of the blood of the guilt offering and put it on the lobe of the right ear of him who is to be cleansed, and on the thumb of his right hand and on the big toe of his right foot.
zh: 然後宰殺作贖愆祭的公羊羔，取一些贖愆祭牲的血，抹在那得潔淨的人的右耳垂上和右手的大拇指上，以及右腳的大拇趾上。

en: And the priest shall pour some of the oil into the palm of his own left hand,
zh: 祭司要把一些油倒在自己的左掌裡；

en: and shall sprinkle with his right finger some of the oil that is in his left hand seven times before the LORD.
zh: 用右手的一個指頭把左掌中的油，在耶和華面前彈七次。

en: And the priest shall put some of the oil that is in his hand on the lobe of the right ear of him who is to be cleansed and on the thumb of his right hand and on the big toe of his right foot, in the place where the blood of the guilt offering was put.
zh: 祭司又要把手中的油，抹在那得潔淨的人的右耳垂上和右手的大拇指上，以及右腳的大拇趾上，就是抹了贖愆祭牲的血的地方。

en: And the rest of the oil that is in the priest's hand he shall put on the head of him who is to be cleansed, to make atonement for him before the LORD.
zh: 祭司把手中剩下的油，抹在那得潔淨的人的頭上，在耶和華面前為他贖罪。

en: And he shall offer, of the turtledoves or pigeons, whichever he can afford,
zh: 那人就要按著自己的經濟能力獻上一隻斑鳩，或是一隻雛鴿。

en: one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering, along with a grain offering. And the priest shall make atonement before the LORD for him who is being cleansed.
zh: 他要按著自己的經濟能力，獻上一隻作贖罪祭，一隻作燔祭，連同素祭一同獻上。祭司要在耶和華面前，為求潔淨的人贖罪。

en: This is the law for him in whom is a case of leprous disease, who cannot afford the offerings for his cleansing."
zh: 這是關於患了痲風病，但經濟能力不足夠預備正常潔淨禮祭物的人，應守的律例。”

en: The LORD spoke to Moses and Aaron, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西和亞倫說：

en: "When you come into the land of Canaan, which I give you for a possession, and I put a case of leprous disease in a house in the land of your possession,
zh: “你們進了我賜給你們作產業的迦南地的時候，我給你們作產業之地的房屋，如果發霉，

en: then he who owns the house shall come and tell the priest, 'There seems to me to be some case of disease in my house.'
zh: 房主就要去告訴祭司：‘據我看來，房屋中似乎染了病症。’

en: Then the priest shall command that they empty the house before the priest goes to examine the disease, lest all that is in the house be declared unclean. And afterward the priest shall go in to see the house.
zh: 祭司進去察看病症之前，要先吩咐人把房屋搬空，免得房屋裡的一切都成了不潔；然後祭司才進去，察看那房屋。

en: And he shall examine the disease. And if the disease is in the walls of the house with greenish or reddish spots, and if it appears to be deeper than the surface,
zh: 他要察看那病症，如果發現在房屋的牆上有發綠或是發紅的腐蝕斑紋，而且有深透入牆的現象；

en: then the priest shall go out of the house to the door of the house and shut up the house seven days.
zh: 祭司就要從房屋裡出來，到房門外去，把房屋隔離七天。

en: And the priest shall come again on the seventh day, and look. If the disease has spread in the walls of the house,
zh: 第七天，祭司要回來察看，如果發現病症在房屋的牆上蔓延，

en: then the priest shall command that they take out the stones in which is the disease and throw them into an unclean place outside the city.
zh: 祭司就要吩咐人把染有病症的石頭挖出來，扔在城外不潔淨的地方，

en: And he shall have the inside of the house scraped all around, and the plaster that they scrape off they shall pour out in an unclean place outside the city.
zh: 要刮淨房屋裡面的四周，把刮下來的灰泥倒在城外不潔淨的地方；

en: Then they shall take other stones and put them in the place of those stones, and he shall take other plaster and plaster the house.
zh: 拿別的石頭放進去代替挖出來的石頭，然後用別的灰泥粉刷房屋。

en: "If the disease breaks out again in the house, after he has taken out the stones and scraped the house and plastered it,
zh: “如果挖出石頭，刮了房屋，粉刷了牆以後，病症再次在房屋裡出現，

en: then the priest shall go and look. And if the disease has spread in the house, it is a persistent leprous disease in the house; it is unclean.
zh: 祭司就要進去察看；如果發現病症在房屋裡有蔓延的現象，這就是房屋裡頑惡的發霉現象，那房屋就不潔淨了。

en: And he shall break down the house, its stones and timber and all the plaster of the house, and he shall carry them out of the city to an unclean place.
zh: 要把房屋拆毀，把房屋裡的石頭、木頭，以及所有的灰泥都搬到城外不潔淨的地方去。

en: Moreover, whoever enters the house while it is shut up shall be unclean until the evening,
zh: 在房屋被關閉的期間，進去的人必不潔淨到晚上。

en: and whoever sleeps in the house shall wash his clothes, and whoever eats in the house shall wash his clothes.
zh: 在房屋裡睡覺的人，要洗淨自己的衣服；在房屋裡吃飯的人，也要洗淨自己的衣服。

en: "But if the priest comes and looks, and if the disease has not spread in the house after the house was plastered, then the priest shall pronounce the house clean, for the disease is healed.
zh: “房屋粉刷以後，祭司進去察看，如果看見病症在房屋裡沒有蔓延，祭司就要宣布那房屋為潔淨，因為已經復原了。

en: And for the cleansing of the house he shall take two small birds, with cedarwood and scarlet yarn and hyssop,
zh: 為了潔淨那房屋，祭司要拿兩隻鳥、香柏木、朱紅色線和牛膝草；

en: and shall kill one of the birds in an earthenware vessel over fresh water
zh: 把一隻鳥，在盛著活水的瓦器上宰殺；

en: and shall take the cedarwood and the hyssop and the scarlet yarn, along with the live bird, and dip them in the blood of the bird that was killed and in the fresh water and sprinkle the house seven times.
zh: 然後拿香柏木、牛膝草、朱紅色線和那隻活鳥，都一同蘸在被宰殺的鳥血和活水中，向房屋彈七次。

en: Thus he shall cleanse the house with the blood of the bird and with the fresh water and with the live bird and with the cedarwood and hyssop and scarlet yarn.
zh: 他就用鳥血、活水、活鳥、香柏木、牛膝草和朱紅色線，潔淨了那房屋；

en: And he shall let the live bird go out of the city into the open country. So he shall make atonement for the house, and it shall be clean."
zh: 然後讓那隻活鳥飛到城外的田野裡去；他為房屋贖罪，房屋就潔淨了。”

en: This is the law for any case of leprous disease: for an itch,
zh: 以上是有關各種痲風病、癬疥、

en: for leprous disease in a garment or in a house,
zh: 衣服和房屋發霉、

en: and for a swelling or an eruption or a spot,
zh: 腫瘤、瘡癬和火斑的律例；

en: to show when it is unclean and when it is clean. This is the law for leprous disease.
zh: 指示人知道甚麼時候不潔淨，甚麼時候潔淨。這是痲風病的律例。
